lint.command: set -a; [ -f ./.env ] && . ./.env; set +a; cargo fmt --check && cargo clippy --bin toggl -- -D warnings

rejectedObservations.observation: The `cli-worker` skill says `tests/live_cli.rs` should only be used when real credentials are available, but this feature legitimately needed changes there to make offline milestones safe under fake local-debug credentials.
